theme_archetype.name: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury (Adapted for Dark Mode SaaS)
theme_archetype.rationale: Indian wedding photography is high-end, visual, and dramatic. The target audience (creatives, editors, videographers) works natively in dark environments (Lightroom, Premiere). A cinematic dark mode with high-contrast golden accents communicates premium quality, trust, and the 'golden hour' aesthetic, while maintaining technical clarity for SaaS operations.

rules.gradients: No generic full-screen gradients. Use subtle radial glows (blur-3xl) behind key elements (like the gig negotiation card) using the brand.muted_accent color.
rules.contrast: Text below 18px must meet 4.5:1 WCAG AA. Interactive elements must explicitly define hover text colors (e.g., hover:text-white).
rules.tinted_grey: Greys are tinted slightly warm (Zinc scale in Tailwind) to complement the amber/gold accents.

rules.marketing: Use Cormorant Garamond for massive, editorial hero headlines to evoke wedding luxury.
rules.dashboard: Use Outfit for all dashboard module titles and numbers to ensure crisp, technical readability.
rules.weights: Avoid generic 'bold'. Mix 'light' headings with 'semibold' UI accents for high tension.
rules.banned: Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, Space Grotesk are strictly prohibited for headings.

spacing_and_layout.system: Tailwind generously spaced scale. p-6, p-8 for standard cards, p-12 to p-24 for section gaps.

grids.marketing: MODE A (Tetris Grid) - Asymmetrical 12-col grid. Use col-span-8 for hero images, col-span-4 for typography. Never fill perfectly; leave negative space.
grids.dashboard: MODE B (Control Room) - Strict 4-col grid. gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized. h-full for children.

rules.optical_alignment: Pad left-aligned text blocks optically when next to icons.
rules.borders: Containers with borders MUST have p-6 or p-8 internal padding.
rules.mobile: Mobile-first grids. Max image height 80vh on mobile to prevent blocking scroll.

surface_styles.glassmorphism: Used for Sticky Navs, Modals, and Action Bars. backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/60 with a sharp 1px border-white/10. Drop shadow: shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)].
surface_styles.cards: Used for Dashboard Widgets. Flat surface (bg-[#131315]), sharp or max rounded-md corners, 1px border-white/10. Hover state: border-[#F59E0B]/50 and slight -translate-y-1.
surface_styles.tracing_beam: Used for the Pricing Card (₹69/mo) and Gig Invite Cards. Masked animated border glow.
surface_styles.grid_borders: Used for the Calendar/Availability view. border-collapse, border-r border-b border-white/5.

rules.scroll: MANDATORY: lenis for smooth momentum scrolling on marketing pages.
rules.hover: All interactive elements must have hover states. transition-all duration-200 ease-out.
rules.entrance: Staggered fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0) for lists (like the Gig Team Assembly).
rules.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Add aria-hidden to decorative animations.

components_strategy.marketing_pages: Pure HTML/Tailwind. Asymmetrical raw divs. No Shadcn structural cards.
components_strategy.dashboard_apps: Shadcn UI heavily customized. Strip default Vercel aesthetic.

specific_components.forms: Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Dark background, white/10 borders.
specific_components.calendar: Shadcn Calendar for multi-day booking. Highlight 90-min buffer slots in muted warning color.
specific_components.toast: Sonner for notifications (Gig accepted, Counter-offer sent).
specific_components.icons: lucide-react for all standard UI icons.

components_strategy.testing: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` (e.g., data-testid='gig-accept-button').

media_and_images.rules: Maximum overlay opacity is bg-black/50. If image is too bright, use gradient overlay. Never use placeholder URLs.

hero_marketing.description: Photographer silhouette at sunset. Use for main landing page hero background.

dashboard_empty_state.description: Macro camera lens. Use for Gear Vault empty state or background.

portfolio_example.description: Stunning Indian bride and groom. Use in the 'Event Workspace' moodboard or Profile showcase.
portfolio_example.treatment: Crisp borders, no overlay, let the colors pop against the dark UI.

pages_and_functionalities.landing_page: Hero with parallax image, dynamic 'Ticker' of premium gear brands. Bento grid for features.
pages_and_functionalities.auth_onboarding: Multi-step wizard. Dark modal over blurred background. Progress bar in gold (#F59E0B).
pages_and_functionalities.dashboard: Control room grid. High contrast metrics (Wallet, Invites).
pages_and_functionalities.gig_management: Split-pane view. Left: Gig details and Session timeline. Right: Team assembly and negotiation loop (Quote/Counter/Accept buttons).
pages_and_functionalities.calendar: Grid borders. Distinct visual states for 'Booked', 'Standby', and '90-min Buffer'.
pages_and_functionalities.financials: Ledger table using Shadcn Table. Strict monospaced fonts for currency values (₹).
pages_and_functionalities.admin_dashboard: Hyper-dense. Monochromatic with red/green status badges for ID Verification.
